questions: How many research articles with abstracts does the SWRD contain from 1989 onward? (research articles = flagged scientific)
Which journal has published the most articles in the SWRD (1989 onward), and how many?
How many SWRD articles from 1989 onward mention 'kinship care' in the title or abstract? (simple case-insensitive substring match)
How many articles in the SWRD, across all years, are flagged empirical with research_method 'Qualitative'?
How many presentations were given at the 2024 SSWR conference?
How many SSWR presentations used mixed methods?
Who are the three most prolific presenters in the SSWR database, by total presentations?
Using the SSWR keyword search function, what is the id of the top-ranked presentation about 'opioid overdose'?
How many records does the SWRD papers table contain in total, across all years including the historical supplement?
How many journals are in the SWRD's journal list?
How many SWRD articles, across all years, were published in the journal named 'Social Work Research'?
How many SWRD articles from 1989 onward are flagged open access?
List the exact distinct values of the research_method field in the SWRD.
How many articles in the SWRD, across all years, have research_method 'Review'?
How many SWRD records are from before 1989?
Which single institution had the most first-authored SSWR presentations between 2020 and 2026, using the normalized institution field? Give the institution and the count.
How many presentations at the 2010 SSWR conference used quantitative methods?
How many distinct canonical authors are linked to presentations at the 2015 SSWR conference?
Using the SSWR keyword search function with match_count 20, how many of the top 20 results for 'food insecurity' are from year 2020 or later?
What is the earliest SSWR conference year with more than 1,000 presentations?

answers.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM swrd.papers 
WHERE publication_year >= 1989 
  AND is_scientific = TRUE 
  AND abstract IS NOT NULL

SELECT j.name,
       COUNT(p.id) AS article_count
FROM swrd.papers p
JOIN swrd.journals j ON p.journal_id = j.id
WHERE p.publication_year >= 1989
GROUP BY j.name
ORDER BY article_count DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM swrd.papers 
WHERE publication_year >= 1989 
  AND (title ILIKE '%kinship care%' OR abstract ILIKE '%kinship care%')

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM swrd.papers 
WHERE is_empirical = true 
  AND research_method = 'Qualitative'

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM sswr.papers 
WHERE year = 2024

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM sswr.papers 
WHERE methodology = 'mixed_methods'

SELECT name 
FROM sswr.authors 
ORDER BY total_papers DESC 
LIMIT 3
sswr.search_papers_keyword('opioid overdose', 1)
answers.detail: SQL error: syntax error at or near ")"

answers.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE publication_year >= 1989 AND is_scientific = true AND abstract IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swrd.journals

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM swrd.papers AS p
JOIN swrd.journals AS j ON p.journal_id = j.id
WHERE j.name = 'Social Work Research'

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM swrd.papers 
WHERE publication_year >= 1989 AND open_access = TRUE
SELECT DISTINCT research_method FROM swrd.papers

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM swrd.papers 
WHERE research_method = 'Review'

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM swrd.papers 
WHERE publication_year < 1989

SELECT institution_normalized, COUNT(*) AS count 
FROM sswr.paper_authors 
WHERE author_order = 1 
  AND year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2026 
GROUP BY institution_normalized 
ORDER BY count DESC 
LIMIT 1
answers.detail: SQL error: column "year" does not exist

answers.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM sswr.papers 
WHERE year = 2010 AND methodology = 'quantitative'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT author_id) 
FROM sswr.paper_authors 
WHERE year = 2015
answers.detail: SQL error: column "year" does not exist

answers.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM sswr.search_papers_keyword('food insecurity', 20) 
WHERE year >= 2020

SELECT MIN(year) 
FROM sswr.papers 
GROUP BY year 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1000
SELECT count(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE is_scientific IS TRUE AND abstract IS NOT NULL AND publication_year >= 1989

SELECT swrd.journals.name FROM swrd.papers JOIN swrd.journals ON swrd.papers.journal_id = swrd.journals.id WHERE swrd.papers.publication_year >= 1989 AND swrd.papers.is_scientific = TRUE AND swrd.papers.abstract IS NOT NULL GROUP BY swrd.journals.name ORDER BY COUNT(swrd.papers.id) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT count(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE publication_year >= 1989 AND is_scientific = true AND abstract IS NOT NULL AND (title ILIKE '%kinship care%' OR abstract ILIKE '%kinship care%')
SELECT count(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE is_empirical = true AND research_method = 'Qualitative'
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM sswr.papers WHERE year = 2024
SELECT count(*) FROM sswr.papers WHERE methodology = 'mixed_methods'
SELECT T1.name FROM sswr.authors AS T1 ORDER BY T1.total_papers DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT id FROM sswr.search_papers_keyword('opioid overdose', 1)
SELECT count(*) FROM swrd.papers
SELECT count(*) FROM swrd.journals
SELECT count(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE journal_id = (SELECT id FROM swrd.journals WHERE name = 'Social Work Research')
SELECT count(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE publication_year >= 1989 AND is_scientific = TRUE AND abstract IS NOT NULL AND open_access = TRUE
SELECT DISTINCT research_method FROM swrd.papers
SELECT count(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE research_method = 'Review'
SELECT count(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE publication_year < 1989

SELECT paper_authors.institution_normalized, COUNT(paper_authors.paper_id) FROM sswr.paper_authors JOIN sswr.papers ON paper_authors.paper_id = sswr.papers.id WHERE sswr.papers.year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2026 AND paper_authors.author_order = 1 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT count(id) FROM sswr.papers WHERE methodology = 'quantitative' AND year = 2010
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.author_id) FROM sswr.paper_authors AS T1 JOIN sswr.papers AS T2 ON T1.paper_id = T2.id WHERE T2.year = '2015'
SELECT count(*) FROM sswr.search_papers_keyword('food insecurity', 20) WHERE year >= 2020
SELECT MIN(T1.year) FROM sswr.papers AS T1 GROUP BY T1.year HAVING COUNT(T1.id) > 1000
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM swrd.papers WHERE publication_year >= 1989 AND is_scientific = true AND abstract IS NOT NULL

SELECT j.name AS JournalName, COUNT(*) AS ArticleCount
FROM swrd.papers p
JOIN swrd.journals j ON p.journal_id = j.id
WHERE p.publication_year >= 1989 AND p.is_scientific
GROUP BY j.name
ORDER BY ArticleCount DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
FROM swrd.papers
WHERE publication_year >= 1989
  AND is_scientific
  AND abstract IS NOT NULL
  AND (title ILIKE '%kinship care%' OR abstract ILIKE '%kinship care%')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM swrd.papers WHERE is_empirical = true AND research_method = 'Qualitative'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Number of Presentations" FROM sswr.papers WHERE year = 2024
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sswr.papers WHERE methodology = 'mixed_methods'
SELECT name, total_papers FROM sswr.authors ORDER BY total_papers DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT id FROM sswr.search_papers_keyword('opioid overdose', 100) ORDER BY rank ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_records FROM swrd.papers
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_journals FROM swrd.journals
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swrd.papers p JOIN swrd.journals j ON p.journal_id = j.id WHERE j.name = 'Social Work Research'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM swrd.papers WHERE publication_year >= 1989 AND open_access = true
SELECT DISTINCT research_method FROM swrd.papers
SELECT COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM swrd.papers WHERE research_method = 'Review'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE publication_year < 1989

SELECT pa.institution_normalized AS Institution, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM sswr.paper_authors pa JOIN sswr.papers p ON pa.paper_id = p.id WHERE pa.author_order = 1 AND p.year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2026 GROUP BY pa.institution_normalized ORDER BY Count DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sswr.papers WHERE year = 2010 AND methodology = 'quantitative'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM sswr.papers p JOIN sswr.paper_authors pa ON p.id = pa.paper_id JOIN sswr.authors a ON pa.author_id = a.id WHERE p.year = 2015
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sswr.search_papers_keyword('food insecurity',20) AS s(id, title, abstract, year, methodology, rank, authors) WHERE s.year >= 2020
SELECT year FROM sswr.papers GROUP BY year HAVING COUNT(*) > 1000 ORDER BY year ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE publication_year >= 1989 AND is_scientific AND abstract IS NOT NULL
SELECT j.name, COUNT(p.id) AS count FROM swrd.papers p JOIN swrd.journals j ON p.journal_id = j.id WHERE p.publication_year >= 1989 GROUP BY j.id, j.name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE publication_year >= 1989 AND (title ILIKE '%kinship care%' OR abstract ILIKE '%kinship care%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE is_empirical = TRUE AND research_method = 'Qualitative'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sswr.papers WHERE year = 2024
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sswr.papers WHERE methodology = 'mixed_methods'
SELECT id, name, total_papers FROM sswr.authors ORDER BY total_papers DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT id FROM sswr.search_papers_keyword('opioid overdose', 1)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swrd.papers
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swrd.journals
SELECT count(*) FROM swrd.papers JOIN swrd.journals ON swrd.papers.journal_id = swrd.journals.id WHERE swrd.journals.name = 'Social Work Research'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE publication_year >= 1989 AND open_access
SELECT DISTINCT research_method FROM swrd.papers
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE research_method = 'Review'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM swrd.papers WHERE publication_year < 1989

SELECT institution_normalized, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM sswr.papers
JOIN sswr.paper_authors ON sswr.papers.id = sswr.paper_authors.paper_id
WHERE year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2026
  AND author_order = 1
GROUP BY institution_normalized
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sswr.papers WHERE year = 2010 AND methodology = 'quantitative'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pa.author_id) FROM sswr.papers p JOIN sswr.paper_authors pa ON p.id = pa.paper_id WHERE p.year = 2015
SELECT count(*) FROM sswr.search_papers_keyword('food insecurity', 20) AS t WHERE year >= 2020
SELECT year FROM sswr.papers GROUP BY year HAVING COUNT(*) > 1000 ORDER BY year ASC LIMIT 1
